# Footer Block

Site footer with multi-column link sections and copyright notice.

## Usage

```markdown
# Footer

Products
- [XC90](https://example.com/xc90)
- [XC60](https://example.com/xc60)
- [S90](https://example.com/s90)

Support
- [Contact](https://example.com/contact)
- [FAQ](https://example.com/faq)

Company
- [About](https://example.com/about)
- [Careers](https://example.com/careers)

Legal
- [Privacy](https://example.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://example.com/terms)
```

## Content Structure

Each row creates a footer column with:
- Column heading
- List of links

## Auto-Generated

- Copyright notice generated automatically
- Dark theme with hover effects
